notes.two_models: Devoko sells two 90L models: (1) round design without ears (ASIN B0FMRB7Z2S, model MW-MSP-0769-6-0818) and (2) cat ears design (ASIN B0FLPKZ4RS, model MW-0769A-0808-MSP-2). Both are 90L capacity.
notes.favicon_low_res: Google Favicons returned only 32x32 despite requesting 128px. Devoko has no dedicated website with high-res logo.
notes.amazon_blocked: Amazon FR/UK/US all returned CAPTCHA pages, preventing direct image extraction from Amazon product listings.
notes.ebay_vs_quildinc: eBay images (EN) and Quildinc images (DE) are the same product shots with different language text overlays. eBay = English, Quildinc = German.
notes.cat_ears_model: Only 1 image found for the cat ears model (from 4-pattes.fr review). More images of this variant would require headless browser access to Amazon.
